verses.text: “Abib kha tang un la, Topa na Pasian uh-a' dingin Paisan Pawi bawl un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Abib kha sungin Topa na Pasian un Egypt gam panin zanin note hong paikhiatpih hi
Tuuhon pan ahi a, bawnghon pan ahi zongin Topa in ama min omna dingin a teelna munah Paisan Pawi biakpiakna Topa na Pasian uh tungah na pia ding uh hi

Silngo sawh anlum tawh na ne kei ding uh a, ni sagih sung silngo sawhloh anlum, gimna anlum tawh na ne ding uh hi. Egypt gam panin nawhsa-in na taikhia uh hi. Egypt gam panin na taikhiat uh hun na nuntak sung tawntung uh na phawk theihna ding uh ahi hi
Na gamsung khempeuh uhah ni sagih sung note lakah silngo kimulo ding hi. A ni masa nitakin biakpiakna-ah na piak uh sa khat peuhpeuh zong a zingsang dong zan tawntung na omsak kei ding uh hi
“ Topa na Pasian un note hong piak khua khempeuhah Paisan Pawi biakpiakna na pia thei kei ding uh hi
Topa na Pasian un ama min omna dingin a teelna mun bekah ni a tum khit nitak, Egypt panin na paikhiat uh hunin Paisan Pawi biakpiakna na pia ding uh hi
Topa na Pasian un a teelna munah huanin na ne ding uh a, zingsang ciangin na puanbukte uhah na ciah thei ding uh hi
Ni guk sung silngo sawhloh anlum na ne ding uh a, a ni sagih ni-in Topa na Pasian uh-a' dingin a thupi kikhopna khat na nei ding uh hi. Tua ni-in na na sem kei ding uh hi
“An na lak masak ni uha kipanin nipikal sagih na simto ding uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa na Pasian un note thupha hong piakna tawh kizui-in na piak ding uh ahi note' khutsung panin utthu-a piakna tawh Topa na Pasian uh tungah nipikal pawi na bawl ding uh hi

Topa na Pasian uh mai, ama min omna dingin Topa na Pasian un a teelna munah, note-a kipan na tanute leh na tapate, na nasem numeite leh na nasem pasalte, na khua sunga om Levi mite, peemtate, pa neilote, leh note lakah a om meigong numeite tawh na lungdam khawm ding uh hi
Egypt-ah sila na hihna uh na phawk ding uh a, hih thukhamte zuih ding limtakin na ngaihsun ding uh hi
“Na ancilna uh leh na leenggah sukna panun an na kaihkhop uh ciangin ni sagih sung buk pawi na bawl ding uh hi
Tua pawi sungah nanga kipan na tanute leh na tapate, na nasem numeite leh na nasem pasalte, Levi mite, peemtate, pa neilote, leh na khua sunga om meigong numeite tawh na lungdam khawm ding uh hi

Topa in a teelna munah ni sagih sung Topa na Pasian uh tungah pawi na bawl ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note na lungdam khawm theihna dingun na khawhsa uh leh na khut uh tawh na sepna khempeuh uhah Topa na Pasian un note thupha hong pia ding hi

“Amah in a teelna mun, Topa na Pasian uh mai-ah pasal khempeuh kum khatin thumvei, silngo sawhloh anlum pawi, nipikal pawi, leh buk pawi-ah kilaak ding uh hi. Amaute khut hawmguakin Topa' mai-ah kilaklo ding uh hi. Topa na Pasian un note thupha hong piaknasa tawh kizui-in mi khempeuh in ama hih theih bang ciatin pia ding uh hi.
“Na minam uh tawh kizui-in Topa na Pasian un note hong piakna khuate-ah thukhente leh uliante na koih ding uh a, amaute in a manin mite tungah thu khen ding uh hi
Thutang na heikhia kei ding uh a, angvan tuam na nei kei ding uh hi. Sumgolh in mipilte' mit tawsakin thumante' thu heikhia ahih manin sumgolh na la kei ding uh hi
Note nungta-in Topa na Pasian un hong piak leitang na luah theihna dingun a thuman bekbekin na gamta ding uh hi
“Note in na bawlsa uh ahi, Topa na Pasian uh biakna tau kiangah Asherah milim dingin khuam khat peuhpeuh na phut kei ding uh hi
Topa na Pasian un a muhdah biakna songpi na phut kei ding uh hi.
